description: Treatment For Mentally 111 To Begin In General Hospitals To most people the general hos pital is a place where sick people go to get help in getting well In the past they have expected the hospital to be of help in case of accidents diseases and disorders of the body A new era is opening up in Geor gia for treatment wherever possi ble of another kind of illness mental illness4n th e general hos pital rather than in a mental in stitution Ther e is goo reason to believe according to Dr Trawick Stubbs director of the Division of Mental Health Georgia Department of Public Health that many people who are committed to mental hos pitals could be helped by several weeks treatment in a general hos pital or in outpatient clinics They could then return to their homes and resume activities with out the long stay in a mental in stitution rhe progress being made toward setting up intensive treatment programs in general hospitals is describe by Dr Stubbs in the April issue of Georgias Health monthly bulletin of the Georgia Health Department The 4page bulletin which brings several health articles to about 18000 readers each month
